stemHtml: Which of the following is correct regarding wake turbulence?

options.a: Wake turbulence gets stronger on the approach but weaker with flaps extended.
options.b: Wake turbulence gets stronger on the approach and with flaps extended.
options.c: Wake turbulence gets weaker on the approach and with flaps extended.
options.d: Wake turbulence gets weaker on the approach but stronger with flaps extended.
